nasb.text: If anyone comes to you and does not bring this teaching, do not receive him into your house, and do not give him a greeting;

esv.text: If anyone comes to you and does not bring this teaching, do not receive him into your house or give him any greeting,

cnv.text: 如果有人到你們那裡，不傳這教訓，你們就不要接待他到家裡，也不要問候他；

ccb.text: 若有人到你们那里不传基督的教导，不要请他到家里，也不要问候他，

csbs.text: 如果有人到你们那里去，不带着这教导，你们就不要接他到家里，也不要问候他，
